zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul於1105年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內米奧時，她的父親Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté15歲，母親Constance De Vermandois21歲。她於1130年之前與Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1171年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul于1105年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內米奧时，她的父亲Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté15岁，母亲Constance De Vermandois21岁。她于1130年之前与Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1171年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul was born in 1105, in Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté, was 15 and her mother, Constance De Vermandois, was 21. She married Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai before 1130, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died after 1171.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul est née en 1105, à Meaux, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Constance De Vermandois, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai avant 1130, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1171.

Sie hat vor 1130 in Europa Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1171.

Lei sposato Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai prima del 1130, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1171.

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul(이)가 1105년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 모스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance De Vermandois(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1130년 이전 우럽에서 Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1171년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de la Ferté-Ancoul родилась в 1105 г. в местности мокс, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Sire Geoffroy de Meaux Dit Geoffroy de la Ferté было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance De Vermandois, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon d'OISY Châtelain de Cambrai перед 1130 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1171 г.
